content:
<action>
<tool>graph.plan</tool>
<objective>Create a structured plan for writing a long novel with detailed settings.</objective>
<steps>
1. Define the genre, tone, and core themes of the novel.
2. Develop a comprehensive world-building document (settings, history, magic/tech systems).
3. Create a character dossier (protagonists, antagonists, supporting cast).
4. Outline the plot structure (act structure, major beats, character arcs).
5. Establish a chapter-by-chapter breakdown.
6. Begin drafting the first chapter.
</steps>
<reason>The owner requested a long novel with detailed settings. I must first establish a structured plan to ensure consistency and depth across the narrative and world-building elements.</reason>
</action>
